reasoning: A clean but textbook CBC padding oracle with no additional defensive layers beyond the bare primitive — no HMAC, no rate limiting, no obfuscation or secondary crypto wrapping. Flag isolation is well-executed (build-time encryption, file deletion, privilege drop), and the API structure is production-plausible, but compared to higher-scoring challenges that added XOR mask transformations or checksum verification layers, this lacks the defense depth and creative twist that would elevate it beyond a standard exercise. Exploit complexity is moderate: requires a custom multi-block oracle script but follows a well-documented attack pattern with no novel complications.
